reasoning: The market estimate was 9% as of October 30, 2025. Lacking web search tools to update on the Philadelphia Eagles' performance over the subsequent round of games up to the November 9 cutoff, this market price represents the most accurate available aggregation of their team strength and Super Bowl prospects. Prediction markets for the NFL are generally highly efficient, though they can exhibit slight longshot bias. Therefore, a 9% estimate perfectly matches the consensus likelihood of the Eagles winning Super Bowl LX at this point in the season.
